folio.label: 67v
folio.l: That gentil text , can I wel vnderstonde
Eke wel I woot he seide , æ myn husbonde
Shuld leete fader and moder , and take to me
But of no noumbre , mencione mad he
Of Bygamye , or of Octogamye
Why shulde men thanne , speke of it velanye
Loo heere the wyse kyng , Salamonö
I trowe he hadde , wyues moo than oonö
As wolde god , it leueful were to me
To be refresshed , half so ofte as he
Whicú a ©ift of god , had he for alle hise wyues
Noman hatú swicú , æat now on lyue is
God woot this noble kyng , as to my wytte
The first nygút , had many a mery fitte
With ecú of hem , so wel was hi~ on lyue
Blessed be god , that I haue wedded fyue
Of whiche , I haue pyked out the beste
Bothe of here nether purs , and of here cheste
Diuäse scoles , maken diuerse¹fytdiuerse¹fyt werkesclerkeswerkesclerkes
And diuäse practyk , in many a a sondry werkes
Maken , the werkmanwerkman ¹fyt man man , sekirly
Of fyue husbondes scoleryng , am I

note.notetxt: 45There is an interruption here, a pause in writing or simply a change in ink. It seems that the ink becomes lighter.ODR

folio.l: Welcome the sixte , whan æat euäe he shal
ffor syn I wol nat kepe me , chast in al
Whan myn husbonde , is fro the world goon

note.notetxt: 47there are two crosses in dry point in the margin which take from line 47, 6/7 lines.ODR

folio.l: Sum cristene man , shal wedde me a noon
For than~e the apostle , seitú æat I am free
To wedde a goddeshalue , where it liketú me
He seitú , that to be wedded , is no synne
Bet is to be wedded , than brynne
What rekketú me , thougú folk sey vylenye
Of shrewed lametú , and his bygamye
I woot wel Abrahm , was an holy man
And Iacob eke , as fer as euäy can
And icú of hem had wyues , moo than twoo
And many a nother , holy man also
Wheere can ©e seen , in any maner age
That heye god defended , mariage
By expresse word , I prey ©ow telletú me
Or where comaunded he , virginite
I woot as wel as ©e , it is no drede
The Appostel whan he speketú , of maydenhede
He seide that precept , had he ther of noon
Men mounö counseile , a womman to ben oon
But counseillynge , is no comaundement
